description: Recursive discoveries surfaced by dossier agents. Each entry: a person mentioned in a dossier as worth following up. Status: pending|approved|dossiered|rejected.

discoveries.name: Sumith Kulal
discoveries.context: Fellow FLUX.1 Kontext co-author at Black Forest Labs. Stanford CS / Hazy Research alum — bridges Chris Re cluster to BFL.

discoveries.name: Chenlin Meng
discoveries.context: Pika CTO. DDIM co-author with Jiaming Song. Stanford Ermon lab. 4th node in diffusion-into-video cluster.

discoveries.name: Robin Rombach
discoveries.context: Black Forest Labs CEO. LDM/Stable Diffusion creator. The BFL founder.

discoveries.name: Sharon Zhou
discoveries.context: Lamini CEO. Saksham's direct manager 2023-2024. Indian-American female founder. Stanford CS PhD under Andrew Ng.

discoveries.name: Tanishq Kumar
discoveries.context: Harvard math '25 -> Stanford CS PhD (Sep 2025) under Percy Liang + Tatsu Hashimoto. ICLR 2025 Oral Scaling Laws for Precision. ~5+ pre-PhD ICLR/ICML papers via Pehlevan/Bordelon. Indian-origin (Tanishq Mathew Kumar). Reference class: Niklas Muennighoff. Site: tanishqkumar.github.io.

discoveries.name: Christina Baek
discoveries.context: CMU final-year PhD (Kolter + Raghunathan). Presidential Fellow. UC Berkeley EECS BS + 5th-year MS under Yi Ma. WiSE-FT reasoning-diversity paper (COLM 2025). Korean-American, female. DatologyAI + Google internships. @_christinabaek.

discoveries.name: Jacob Mitchell Springer
discoveries.context: CMU 3rd-year MLD PhD (Raghunathan). NSF GRFP. Lead 1st author on SCOPE Outstanding Paper + 2 ICML 2026 papers including an oral. Swarthmore CS '22 + Los Alamos pre-PhD. 5 first-author award-tier papers in 3 years. sprin.xyz.

discoveries.name: Andrew Li
discoveries.context: Judgment Labs Chief Scientist co-founder, 23. Early research hire at Together AI (Tri Dao's company). UC Berkeley. Best friends with Alex Shan + Joseph Camyre since childhood.

discoveries.name: Yichuan Wang
discoveries.context: Berkeley SkyLab 2nd-yr PhD, SJTU ACM Honored Class. LEANN lead author (MLSys 2026 Best Paper). Chenfeng called him 'one of my favorite people to cook with' + teased 'our next project might be even crazier'.

discoveries.name: Haocheng Xi
discoveries.context: Berkeley Keutzer + MIT HAN Lab. Tsinghua Yao Class '24. Quant VideoGen lead (7x KV memory reduction). Connects directly to architecture cluster.

discoveries.name: Monishwaran Maheswaran
discoveries.context: Berkeley Honors EECS+Math. Indian. Squeeze Evolve lead (97.5% ARC-AGI-V2 SoTA). BAIR + Berkeley Lab nuclear fusion.

discoveries.name: Junxiong Wang
discoveries.context: Cornell PhD + Together AI. Aurora + I-DLM co-author with Chenfeng.

discoveries.name: Ninad Jadhav
discoveries.context: REACT Lab labmate of Weiying Wang. WSR co-author. 'Trust-Based Algorithms for Resilient Multiagent' thesis. Highest-probability co-founder candidate for Weiying's stealth humanoid co.

discoveries.name: Yilun Du
discoveries.context: Harvard CS + Kempner Institute Assistant Professor. Embodied Minds Lab. Ex-OpenAI / ex-Google DeepMind. MIT EECS PhD under Kaelbling+Lozano-Perez+Tenenbaum. Verify before using as warm intro for Weiying.

discoveries.name: Dustin Tran
discoveries.context: DeepMind. TFP collaborator with Joshua Dillon. Major probabilistic ML researcher. Mid-career, departure watch candidate.

discoveries.name: Yaniv Ovadia
discoveries.context: Google. 1st author on 'Can you trust your model's uncertainty' (2,839 cites). Could be next departure candidate.

discoveries.name: Jie Ren
discoveries.context: DeepMind. 1st author on 'Likelihood ratios for OOD detection' (1,019 cites). Joshua co-author.

discoveries.name: Prithwish Dan
discoveries.context: Cornell CS MS student in Sanjiban Choudhury's PoRTaL lab. Co-1st author on 6 papers with Kushal Kedia: X-Sim (CoRL 2025 Oral + RSS EgoAct Best Paper Runner-up), X-Diffusion (ICRA 2026), RHyME (ICRA 2025), ManiCast (CoRL 2023), Game-Theoretic Framework (IROS 2023), InteRACT (ICRA 2024). MOST LIKELY CO-FOUNDER CANDIDATE if Kushal goes founder route — graduating MS in 2026 into same humanoid market. Site: pdan101.github.io. Verified Scholar BZGUSN8AAAAJ at cornell.edu. Indian (likely IIT undergrad). Watch his next-step LinkedIn announcement — if same place as Kushal that's industry hire; if they incorporate together, that's founding move.

discoveries.name: Tyler Ga Wei Lum
discoveries.context: Stanford CS PhD in C. Karen Liu's lab. Co-1st author on SimToolReal (arXiv Feb 2026) with Kushal Kedia + Bohg + Karen Liu — zero-shot dexterous tool manipulation. Verified Scholar kPq6-XIAAAAJ at stanford.edu. The Karen Liu lab bridge for Kushal. If Karen Liu's partial leave Jan-Jun 2026 is at a humanoid co, Tyler likely follows. Dexterous manipulation = direct PI / Figure / 1X wedge.

discoveries.name: Sanjiban Choudhury
discoveries.context: Cornell CS Assistant Professor + ML Researcher at Aurora (autonomous trucking, $5B+ public co). Leads PoRTaL group (Personal Robotics at Cornell). ONR Young Investigator 2024 + OpenAI Superalignment Award 2024 + Google Research Award 2024. CMU RI PhD (Sebastian Scherer). Started Cornell Aug 2021. Advisor relationship node — if Kushal/Prithwish go founder, Choudhury becomes high-signal LP / advisor candidate. Lab alumni pipeline: Kushal Kedia (graduating May 26), Huaxiaoyue Wang, Juntao Ren, Rajat Kumar Jenamani, Atiksh Bhardwaj, Yuki Wang, Gonzalo Gonzalez-Pumariega. PoRTaL alumni map = future founding cohort tracker.

discoveries.name: Huaxiaoyue Wang
discoveries.context: Cornell CS PhD student in Choudhury PoRTaL lab. Co-1st author on MOSAIC (CoRL 2024 + Best Paper VLMNM ICRA 24 + Best Poster MoMa ICRA 24). Senior lab member. Verified Scholar yweLdycAAAAJ at cs.cornell.edu. Chinese-origin. Track for own graduation timeline.

discoveries.name: Maximus Adrian Pace
discoveries.context: Cornell CS MS in PoRTaL lab. Co-1st on X-Diffusion (ICRA 2026), co-author on X-Sim + RHyME. Verified Scholar GvFzdWoAAAAJ. Cornell MS in CS. Robotics imitation learning focus.

discoveries.name: Rajat Kumar Jenamani
discoveries.context: Cornell CS PhD. IIT KGP undergrad — co-author on Kushal's 2020 pre-PhD motion-planning paper. The IIT KGP -> Cornell PhD pipeline node. Verified Scholar 1lVR0HoAAAAJ at cornell.edu. Indian. Track for graduation + post-PhD step.

discoveries.name: Juntao Ren
discoveries.context: Cornell CS (Choudhury PoRTaL). Co-1st on MOSAIC + 1st author on Human-to-Robot Transfer Learning (ICRA 2025, arXiv:2501.06994). PoRTaL alumni cohort.

discoveries.name: Atiksh Bhardwaj
discoveries.context: Cornell undergrad/MS. Long-term PoRTaL collaborator — co-author on InteRACT (ICRA 24), ManiCast, X-Diffusion. Watch for grad school choice.

discoveries.name: C. Karen Liu
discoveries.context: Stanford CS Professor (humanoid + character animation + computational biomechanics). ACM SIGGRAPH Academy 2021 + Sloan 2010 + MIT TR Young Innovators 2007 + SIGGRAPH Significant New Researcher 2012. UW CS PhD. Ex-Georgia Tech IC. **ON PARTIAL LEAVE JAN-JUN 2026** — high-information signal, most likely humanoid co sabbatical (PI / Figure / 1X / Skild / Boston Dynamics candidate). Stanford Movement Lab + Bio-X + HAI + Wu Tsai Human Performance Alliance. Affiliated humanoid network: Stanford IPRL (Bohg) + Tyler Lum (SimToolReal co-1st w/ Kushal). Verify destination if possible — that tells us where Kushal is most likely heading.

discoveries.name: Jeannette Bohg
discoveries.context: Stanford CS Assistant Professor. Director of IPRL (Interactive Perception and Robot Learning Lab). 2023 Sloan Research Fellowship + 2019 IEEE RAS Early Career + 2020 RSS Early Career. KTH PhD. Ex-MPI Autonomous Motion. Canonical Stanford robotic grasping + manipulation group. Advisor relationship node for Kushal's Stanford visit. Lab pipeline: Tyler Lum + others. Track IPRL student departures.

discoveries.name: Wei-Chiu Ma
discoveries.context: Cornell CS Assistant Professor. MIT PhD under Antonio Torralba + Raquel Urtasun. Ex-Senior Research Scientist at Uber ATG + Waabi. CMU MS in Robotics under Kris Kitani. Siebel Scholar 2022. CPS Rising Star 2023. 3D/4D computer vision -> robotics bridge. Kushal's co-advisor. Lab students: Chuanruo Ning, Guangzhao He, Rundong Luo, Tao Tu, Xuyi Meng. Track Cornell vision-robotics pipeline.
